node.text: Caroline acknowledged the traumatic experience of Melanie's family being in an accident during the road trip.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "son accident handling") on Session 18 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Caroline went hiking last week and got into a bad spot with some people but tried to apologize.
Caroline appreciates seeing Melanie's love for her family and acknowledges that they are her rock.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "son accident handling") on Session 18 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Caroline believes that loved ones give strength to tackle challenges.
